title: Campaigns | Suella Braverman
h1: Rt Hon Suella Braverman KC MP
text_excerpt: --> Campaigns | Suella Braverman top of page Rt Hon Suella Braverman KC MP Home News About Campaigns Articles Events Contact Rt Hon Suella Braverman KC MP Home News About Campaigns Articles Events Contact Fareham and Waterlooville I am very proud to be the Reform UK Member of Parliament for Fareham and Waterlooville. As well as supporting individual constituents to solve their issues and problems I have also has run many successful campaigns on local and national issues, a selection of these are below where you can find out more. If you think I can help you on any of these matters or something else please email suella.braverman.mp@parliament.uk Waterlooville Regeneration Havant Borough Council has promised that a regeneration of Waterlooville town centre is coming. So where is it? I am urging HBC to get on with the job and deliver for local people. Supporting our farmers Suella is very proud to support our brilliant British farmers. She voted against the Family Farm Tax and will continue to speak up for the countryside. Southern Water Suella is passionate about holding Southern Water to account. In January 2026 she held a public meeting with water executives getting people to have their say. Learn more Support our farms Southern Water Anti-social behaviour Suella is committed to working with Hampshire & Isle of Wight Police as well as local councils and community groups to keep Fareham and Waterlooville safe. London Road, Waterlooville Suella led the successful campaign against the Home Office placing illegal migrants in the heart of Waterlooville. Her petition was signed by over 10,000 people. Portchester banking hub Suella has been campaigning for a Banking Hub to be put into Portchester. She created a petition and continues to speak on this issue in Parliament. Learn more Our campaign Support me Henry Cort College & SEND SEND is not working for so many families it's too bureaucratic, too expensive and insufficient resource for our children and families. It’s also why I keep urging Hampshire County Council to repurpose Henry Cort College as a Special Education Needs School. Fareham Boxing Club Suella is actively supporting Fareham Boxing Club and their search for a permanent home. She recognises their positive role in youth development, fitness and community safety. Rowans Hospice Suella has championed Rowans Hospice as an indispensable community resource and campaigned for successfully for increased funding and recognition of the vital care it provides to families facing life-limiting illnesses. Learn more Help FBC Rowans © 2026 Promoted by Suella Braverman KC MP Home Contact Cookie Policy © 2026 Promoted by the Office of Suella Braverman KC MP Home Contact Cookie Policy bottom of page
